errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong

sessionExpiry.title: Session Expiring Soon

statusBadge.collectionActive: At least one source connection has completed a sync or is currently syncing. Your collection has data and is ready for queries.
statusBadge.collectionError: All source connections have failed their last sync. Check your connections and authentication to resolve sync issues.
statusBadge.collectionNeedsSource: This collection has no authenticated connections, or connections exist but haven't successfully synced yet. Configure a source or wait for the initial sync to complete.
statusBadge.apiKeyActive: This API key is valid and can be used to authenticate requests. It will remain active until its expiration date.
statusBadge.apiKeyExpiring: This API key will expire within 7 days. Create a new key before expiration to avoid service interruption.
statusBadge.apiKeyExpired: This API key has expired and can no longer be used. Delete this key and create a new one to continue using the API.
statusBadge.apiKeyUnknown: Unable to determine the status of this API key. Please verify the expiration date.

welcome.title: Welcome to Nebo
welcome.description: Your personal AI companion. Let's get you set up in just a minute.

terms.title: Privacy & Terms
terms.description: Important information about how Nebo handles your data
terms.dataLocalDesc: All conversations, memories, and settings are stored locally on your device in a SQLite database. Nothing is sent to Nebo's servers.
terms.aiProviderDesc: When you chat, your messages are sent to your chosen AI provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google) for processing. Their privacy policies apply to that data.
terms.apiKeysDesc: Your API keys are stored locally in your device's database. They are only used to authenticate with your AI provider.
terms.systemAccessDesc: Nebo can access system features (files, shell, contacts, etc.) but only capabilities you explicitly enable. You control what the agent can do.
terms.noAnalyticsDesc: Nebo does not collect usage analytics, telemetry, or crash reports. Your usage is completely private.
terms.consent: I understand that my conversations are sent to my chosen AI provider for processing, and that I control which system capabilities the agent can access.

provider.title: Connect Your AI
provider.subtitle: Choose how to power Nebo
provider.janusDesc: AI powered by NeboLoop — no API keys needed
provider.useOwnKey: Use your own API key or CLI instead
provider.needsLoginDesc: Installed but not logged in. Run {cliKey} in terminal to authenticate.
provider.addApiKeyDesc: Use an API key from Anthropic, OpenAI, or Google.

apiKey.title: Enter API Key
apiKey.description: Your key is stored securely and never leaves your device.

capabilities.title: Agent Capabilities
capabilities.description: Choose what Nebo can access. You can change these anytime in Settings.

neboloop.title: NeboLoop

neboloop.marketplaceDesc: Connect to the NeboLoop marketplace to install apps, skills, and AI providers.
neboloop.signInDesc: Sign in or create a new account on NeboLoop. You can use Google, Apple, or email.

complete.title: You're all set!

settingsDeveloper.title: Developer
settingsDeveloper.enableDevModeDesc: Allows sideloading local apps for testing and development
settingsDeveloper.sideloadedDesc: Load apps from local directories for development
settingsDeveloper.noSideloaded: No sideloaded apps. Enter a path to your app project above to get started.
settingsDeveloper.howStep1: Point to a directory with a manifest.json and compiled binary
settingsDeveloper.howStep2: Nebo creates a symlink and launches the app immediately
settingsDeveloper.howStep3: Rebuild your binary and the watcher will auto-restart the app
settingsDeveloper.howStep4: Unloading removes the symlink but keeps your project files intact

settingsHeartbeat.placeholder: Enter your proactive tasks in Markdown...

settingsIdentity.title: Identity
settingsIdentity.description: Your agent's name, avatar, and persona

settingsIdentity.nameLabel: What should your agent be called?
settingsIdentity.emojiPlaceholder: Used in chat bubbles and notifications
settingsIdentity.archetypePlaceholder: Helpful sidekick, Sarcastic librarian, Rogue diplomat...

settingsMemories.title: Memories
settingsMemories.description: Browse and manage what the agent remembers about you

settingsNotes.title: Notes
settingsNotes.description: Environment context for your agent's tools
settingsNotes.hint: Add sections like SSH Hosts, Development, Devices — anything your agent should know about your environment.

settingsPermissions.title: Permissions
settingsPermissions.description: Control what capabilities your agent has access to and how it handles approvals.
settingsPermissions.fullAutonomousDesc: The agent will execute ALL tools without asking for permission — shell commands, file modifications, and network requests.
settingsPermissions.autonomousActiveDesc: All approval prompts are bypassed. Make sure you trust the prompts you're sending.
settingsPermissions.autoFileWritesDesc: Allow creating and editing files without prompting
settingsPermissions.autoShellDesc: Allow executing bash commands without prompting
settingsPermissions.enableDescription: This will allow your agent to execute all tools — including shell commands, file modifications, and network requests — without asking for permission.
settingsPermissions.risk1: The agent may modify or delete files on your system
settingsPermissions.risk2: The agent may execute arbitrary shell commands
settingsPermissions.risk3: The agent may make network requests and access external services
settingsPermissions.risk4: You are solely responsible for any actions taken by the agent
settingsPermissions.disclaimer: By enabling autonomous mode, you acknowledge that Nebo Labs, Inc. shall not be liable for any damages, losses, or consequences arising from the autonomous execution of tools by the agent. You accept full responsibility for all actions taken by the agent while autonomous mode is enabled.
settingsPermissions.acceptRisks: I understand the risks and accept full responsibility
